name.marathi: प्रधानमंत्री स्ट्रीट व्हेंडर्स आत्मनिर्भर निधी योजना

scheme.launched_by: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, Government of India
scheme.department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA)

budget_provision.phase_2: Extension with additional credit support by Government of India

objective.primary: To provide collateral-free working capital loans to street vendors across India
secondary: Support urban informal economy recovery after COVID-19
Promote digital transactions among street vendors
Encourage financial inclusion through banking access
Improve livelihood stability of street vendors

loan_assistance.interest_subsidy: 7% per annum subsidy on timely repayment
loan_assistance.transfer_mode: Direct bank transfer (collateral-free working capital loan)

additional_benefits: Cashback up to ₹100 per month on digital transactions
Eligibility for higher loan slabs on timely repayment
Access to skill training and digital literacy programs
Integration with UPI and digital payment platforms

residency.details: Street vendors operating in urban areas of India

street_vendor_proof.details: Must possess Certificate of Vending or ID card issued by Urban Local Body (ULB)

loan_history.note: First-time borrowers as well as existing small borrowers eligible

bank_account.details: Active savings bank account with Aadhaar linkage
